answers: \begin{align*} 12x^2 - xy - 6y^2 &= 0 \\ 12x^2 &= xy + 6y^2 \\ 12x^2 &= xy + 2 \cdot 3 y^2 \\ 12x^2 &= xy + by^2 && \begin{matrix}\text{since }3 = 1.5 \cdot 2\end{matrix} \\ 12x^2 &= (x + by)y \\ 12x^2 &= my y && \begin{matrix}\text{since }y = my && \text{let }y = my \\ & x = my && \text{replace with }x\end{matrix} \\ 12x^2 &= my^2 \\ 12x^2 &= (12m) y^2 \\ 1 &= 12 m \\ m &= \frac{1}{12} \\ \frac{x}{y} &= m \\ \therefore \frac{x}{y} &= \frac{1}{12} \\ x &= \frac{1}{12}y \end{align*}
